items.caption: I'm a fan of the Safdie brothers' films, and Uncut Gems is perfection! 💎💎💎💎💎💎💎💎
Daniel Lopatin, better known as Oneohtrix Point Never, did the scores for nearly all of the Safdie brothers' movies, and I'm heavily into experimental electronic and ambient music
I generated it in Midjourney but I actually love this place lol
